title: ivl: logic_lpm.c:485: find_local_signal: Assertion `! sig' failed.

features.name: same wire input output port connection through hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a wire connected to both an input port and an output port of a child instance, passed through two levels of hierarchical port bindings

features.name: pass_through module instantiation with input output ports
features.description: Code should include a pass-through module that forwards input and output signals to a child instance
